subcategory : "Instances"
---

# ovh_cloud_instance_group

Use this data source to retrieve information about an instance group (placement group) in a public cloud project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "ovh_cloud_instance_group" "group" {
  service_name = <Public cloud project id>
  id           = "<instance group id>"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Instance group ID
- `service_name` (String) Service name / cloud project id

### Read-Only

- `checksum` (String) Target-spec checksum
- `created_at` (String) Creation date
- `current_state` (Attributes) Observed state (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--current_state))
- `name` (String) Instance group name
- `policy` (String) Placement policy (AFFINITY, ANTI_AFFINITY)
- `region` (String) Region
- `resource_status` (String) Readiness status
- `updated_at` (String) Last update date

<a id="nestedatt--current_state"></a>
### Nested Schema for `current_state`

Read-Only:

- `location` (Attributes) Observed location (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--current_state--location))
- `members` (Attributes List) Instances currently belonging to the group (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--current_state--members))
- `name` (String) Observed instance group name
- `policy` (String) Observed placement policy

<a id="nestedatt--current_state--location"></a>
### Nested Schema for `current_state.location`

Read-Only:

- `availability_zone` (String)
- `region` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--current_state--members"></a>
### Nested Schema for `current_state.members`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
